title: Reading the Treble Clef
description: Learn the letter names of the lines and spaces specifically for the Treble Clef (G Clef).

sessions.title: Treble Clef: Line Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes on the five lines of the Treble Clef: E4, G4, B4, D5, F5.

sessions.title: Treble Clef: Space Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes in the four spaces of the Treble Clef: F4, A4, C5, E5.

sessions.title: Treble Clef Review
sessions.description: Mix lines and spaces together for the full Treble Clef staff.

proficiencies.title: Mastery of Reading the Treble Clef

levels.criteria: Can fluently name notes from E4 to F5.
